title: Memecylon amaniense
taxonomy: Memecylon amaniense is classified within the family Melastomataceae and the order Myrtales. It belongs to the genus Memecylon. The genus Memecylon is a part of the larger family Melastomataceae. This classification suggests that Memecylon amaniense is a member of the family that includes tropical plants with showy flowers. The order Myrtales also comprises various flowering plant species found in tropical and subtropical regions.

Memecylon amaniense is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues.
